tasks.subject: Task 1: useMessageJump hook with unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Isolated hook that exposes jumpToMessage(id) and current {highlightId, seq}, switching activeTabId to the channel's messages tab when called.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/client/src/hooks/useMessageJump.ts
- Create: apps/client/src/hooks/__tests__/useMessageJump.test.tsx

**Verify:** cd apps/client && pnpm test src/hooks/__tests__/useMessageJump.test.tsx -- --run

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/client/src/hooks/useMessageJump.ts","apps/client/src/hooks/__tests__/useMessageJump.test.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/client && pnpm test src/hooks/__tests__/useMessageJump.test.tsx -- --run","acceptanceCriteria":["Hook exports useMessageJump(channelTabs, setActiveTabId)","Returns {jumpToMessage, highlightId, seq}","First jump sets highlightId and seq=1 and calls setActiveTabId with messages tab id","Repeat jump to same id bumps seq","Jump to different id updates highlightId and bumps seq","No messages tab = no-op","jumpToMessage ref stable across renders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TableView row OPEN button + prop forwarding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TableView accepts onJumpToMessage and renders a hover-revealed OPEN button in each row's Content cell that calls it with the message id. Tests in Views.test.tsx cover the new behavior.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/client/src/components/channel/views/TableView.tsx
- Modify: apps/client/src/components/channel/views/__tests__/Views.test.tsx

**Verify:** cd apps/client && pnpm test src/components/channel/views/__tests__/Views.test.tsx -- --run

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/client/src/components/channel/views/TableView.tsx","apps/client/src/components/channel/views/__tests__/Views.test.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/client && pnpm test src/components/channel/views/__tests__/Views.test.tsx -- --run","acceptanceCriteria":["TableViewProps has optional onJumpToMessage","Prop forwarded to each TableRow","Content cell button has aria-label 'Open in chat' when prop provided","Click calls onJumpToMessage with row message.id","Click uses stopPropagation so it does not trigger edit","No button rendered when prop absent","Button uses opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire ChannelView — pass jump callback down and drive highlight
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ChannelView uses useMessageJump and wires it so clicking OPEN on a table row switches the active tab to the messages tab and causes MessageList to scroll to + highlight the target message; repeat clicks on the same message re-trigger scroll via a seq-keyed wrapper.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/client/src/components/channel/ChannelView.tsx

**Verify:** Manual smoke test in dev + regression suite: cd apps/client && pnpm test -- --run

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/client/src/components/channel/ChannelView.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/client && pnpm test -- --run","acceptanceCriteria":["ChannelView calls useMessageJump(channelTabs, setActiveTabId)","TableView receives onJumpToMessage=jumpToMessage","ChannelContent highlightMessageId = jumpHighlightId ?? initialMessageId","Wrapper around ChannelContent is keyed on jumpSeq","initialMessageId deep-link flow still works","Manual: click OPEN switches to chat tab, scrolls, highlights; repeat click re-triggers"]}
```
